active.prompt: Cinematic cyberpunk night city, fast tracking camera, sharper contrast, energetic traffic flow, flickering neon, rain reflections, dynamic crowd motion

calm.prompt: Cinematic cyberpunk night city, slow floating camera, soft rain reflections, drifting steam, gentle traffic, dreamlike neon haze
